turns.user_message: I keep getting this tightness in my chest when I think about things. It's been happening for a few weeks now.
That heavy feeling in my chest is just always there now. I feel so lonely even when I'm not alone.
The ache in my chest feels like it's crushing me from the inside. I don't know how to make it stop anymore.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This has been going on for a while.
